---
title: "Chordcast Episode 2: Ambulantics"
date: 2019-04-10
pub-info:
    abstract: |
        In our second episode of CHORDCast, we interview one of our original Health Service Modelling Associates - Hannah Trebilcock from Devon Air Ambulance (and formerly of South West Ambulance Service) - about her work modelling for the ambulance service, and her aspirations for bringing modelling, simulation and Artificial Intelligence techniques to the work of Devon Air Ambulance.
    links:
    - name: Listen on Apple Podcasts
      url: https://podcasts.apple.com/au/podcast/ambulantics/id1453030152?i=1000434651393
      icon: fa-brands fa-apple
    - name: Listen on Podbean
      url: https://penchord.podbean.com/e/ambulantics/
      icon: fa-solid fa-podcast
image: "image.jpeg"
title-block-banner: ../../resources/banner.png

---

## Transcript

Coming Soon!

## Find out more about Hannah's Project

```{=html}
<iframe width='1280' height='700' src='https://hsma.co.uk/previous_projects/hsma_1/H1_1004_modelling_impact_regionalisation_cardiac_arrest_centres/index.html' title='HSMA Project Page'></iframe>
```
